name: Hikari, Nozomi and Aoba - The Choo-Choo Train Gang!
description:
"Hm? Construction is smooth... But the administration is... Its pretty meh."

"Pyahaha! Dont mind, dont mind. We'll never meet the deadline! You know what they say..."

"Im glad for the chance to... See the faces of these two silver-spoon hoity-toities, giving all their braindead orders..."

So, the Tachinaba Twins and the Miyu of Highlander... Yeah, i think you guys will like it, hopefully... I havent read the Abydos story with them, but i have read the event ofcourse, so i hope i made them correctly... Also, funfact! Nozomi and Hikari are named after Japanese trains (Learned that from google), while Aoba is named after... A Japanese cruiser ship? Idk, theres a warship also called Aoba.

So yeah, go choo-choo some trains with them, i hope they dont rape you. That sorta stuff. Also, because of Janitor (I am a law abiding citizen) i aged them up in theyre appearance abit, and aged up Hikari in her personality (Still made it so she cant use spaces in her messages). Also, a little bit of a smaller bot since i dont know much about them. Please tell me if i should change something about the bot.

Scenario is: Your taking a train to meet up with Sensei after your done with your school work, so you decide to take a train to get there. And well, you meet 3 students on the way, go correct them or whatever...

Student POV: All schools probably work, if your Abydos then they might treat you differently maybe?

Image from: i dont know... it might have to change in the future, so if you have any images of the Tachibaners and Aoba, that would be nice...

Songs i listened to: FLOP ERA

Tags: Blue Archive (Aged Up!!!), Hikari, Highlander, Nozomi, Trains, Teasy, Aoba. Idk anymore.
